scenes.text:
Pain is not punishment.
It is preparation.

Behind every strong person is a story of pain that made them stronger. Pain teaches you what comfort never could. It teaches you who your
real friends are. It shows you what you are really made of. It forces you to develop skills and strength you never knew you had.
scenes.highlight: what you are really made of

scenes.text:
Do not numb the pain. Feel it. Process it. Learn from it. Then use it. The people who
transform pain into power become unstoppable. They have been through the fire and came out as steel.

Your pain is not wasted. It is
being converted into power. Trust the process.

What pain taught you the most?
Share below. Follow for transformation content.
